title: Lulla Man
original_title: ผู้ชายลัลล้า
overview: Three married guys sneak out every night to cheat on their wives. They come up with ingenious ways of not getting caught so they think that their wives know nothing about their night-time activities. However, they do and the wives have teamed up to wreak some revenge.
